title: Order placement endpoint
overview: Adds a POST /orders endpoint. Read the API contract first, then the handler that decodes the payload, the service that builds and stores the order, and finally the new orders table. Suggested path: Contract → POST /orders → Storage.

chapters.title: Contract — POST /orders
chapters.summary: New endpoint added to the OpenAPI spec: accepts an Order JSON body, returns 201.

chapters.title: POST /orders — place an order
chapters.summary: Handler decodes the payload and delegates to the service, which builds a domain Order and inserts it.

units.summary: Declares POST /orders accepting an Order body, returning 201.
units.detail: The contract the rest of this change implements; read it first.

units.summary: Decodes PlaceOrderRequest and calls the order service, returning the new id.
units.detail: Entry point for the order flow: decodes the JSON body, delegates to Service.Place, and writes back the new id.

units.summary: Builds a domain Order from the request items and inserts it via the repo.
units.detail: Called by the handler; constructs the domain Order and hands it to the repository to persist.

units.layerReason: schema migration for the orders table
units.detail: The backing store the repository writes to.
